hero.subtitle: Arcane Blue joins digital products, internal platforms, integrations and evolving systems to turn business needs into clear, useful software that can keep growing.

about.title: An engineering team to build, organize and evolve software with you.
about.description: We do not sell rigid packages. We join the context, understand what already exists and help your team make solid technical decisions while the product keeps moving.
about.description2: That can mean a fresh MVP, an internal platform, system integrations, automations, refactors or modernizing legacy software. The common thread is always the same: close engineering, practical delivery and none of the corporate theater.

differentials.title: Product thinking with hands-on code
differentials.desc: We shape experience, architecture and delivery together instead of splitting strategy from execution.

differentials.title: Integrations that stay manageable
differentials.desc: We connect APIs, services and internal flows without turning operations into something painful to maintain.

differentials.title: Evolution without starting over
differentials.desc: We improve live systems carefully so you keep context, continuity and delivery speed.

differentials.title: Direct partnership
differentials.desc: Small teams, honest communication and direct contact with the people shaping and writing the software.

services.title: How we usually join projects
services.subtitle: We work across different kinds of software, always aiming for technical clarity, a good product experience and continuity after launch.

items.title: Digital products
items.description: Web products and SaaS work from discovery through production-ready delivery.
features: Front-end and back-end in the same flow
A base that can grow with the product

items.title: Internal platforms
items.description: Tools, portals and operational systems that help teams work better every day.
features: Integrations with systems already in place

items.title: Integrations and automation
items.description: Connections between services, partners and processes that are still creating manual work today.

items.title: Modernization and scale
items.description: Structural improvements for software that is growing, changing phase or starting to feel technical pressure.

cta.title: If you have software to launch or untangle, let's talk.
cta.subtitle: Share the context and we can figure out the best next step together. No canned pitch and no unnecessary pressure.

footer.description: Software engineering for products, platforms, integrations and systems that still need to keep evolving.
footer.tagline: Small teams. Direct communication. Software with purpose.
